news.title:
Mazagon Dock Ltd saw a notable surge in futures open interest on March 12.
NSE F&O pack recorded over 7% increase in total open interest compared to prior trade.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock Ltd saw a notable surge in futures open interest on March 12.
NSE F&O pack recorded over 7% increase in total open interest compared to prior trade.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders awaits final approval for a major submarine contract, potentially worth Rs 1 lakh crore, exceeding its current backlog.
The stock trades at 40x earnings, driven by future earnings duration; delays in contract awards could impact valuation and growth outlook.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders awaits final approval for a major submarine contract, potentially worth Rs 1 lakh crore, exceeding its current backlog.
The stock trades at 40x earnings, driven by future earnings duration; delays in contract awards could impact valuation and growth outlook.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders hosted an investor presentation highlighting achievements, including delivery of 7 destroyers and 6 submarines since 2017.
MDL signed MoUs for submarine programs and collaborations, showcased dividend distribution, and emphasized 'Aatmanirbhar Bharat' through defense initiatives.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders hosted an investor presentation highlighting achievements, including delivery of 7 destroyers and 6 submarines since 2017.
MDL signed MoUs for submarine programs and collaborations, showcased dividend distribution, and emphasized 'Aatmanirbhar Bharat' through defense initiatives.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock surges 15% in 2 sessions on strong order win expectations.
Nykaa drops over 2% as Macquarie forecasts an 18% downside.
news.summary:

news.title:
Mazagon Dock shares surged 18% in two days, trading 7.8% higher at ₹2,536.6, marking best week since May 2025.
Company clarified on ₹99,000 crore order, expects P75I submarine order by FY-end, boosting order book above ₹1 lakh crore.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock shares surged 18% in two days, trading 7.8% higher at ₹2,536.6, marking best week since May 2025.
Company clarified on ₹99,000 crore order, expects P75I submarine order by FY-end, boosting order book above ₹1 lakh crore.

news.title:
Markets rebounded with over 1% gains as Nifty crossed 24,600 resistance.
Mixed global cues and hurdles at 24,800-25,000 may impact sustainability.

Proposal for the defense deal now awaits government approval.

news.title:
Indian Navy plans a ₹99,000 crore deal for 6 German submarines.
Submarines to be built in Mumbai by Mazagon Dock, Thyssenkrupp involved.
news.summary:

news.title:
India's defence budget of ₹7.85 lakh crore boosts sector visibility; Mazagon Dock and Garden Reach hold robust order books.
Mazagon Dock specializes in submarines/warships; Garden Reach focuses on advanced patrol vessels and shows strong execution momentum.
news.summary:
India's defence budget of ₹7.85 lakh crore boosts sector visibility; Mazagon Dock and Garden Reach hold robust order books.
Mazagon Dock specializes in submarines/warships; Garden Reach focuses on advanced patrol vessels and shows strong execution momentum.

news.title:
HAL, Mazagon Dock, GRSE see order visibility due to defence demand, aircraft replacement.
India may need 200-400 aircraft in 7-15 years; HAL, GRSE, Mazagon Dock to benefit.
news.summary:
HAL, Mazagon Dock, GRSE see order visibility due to defence demand, aircraft replacement.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders declares a 2nd interim dividend of ₹7.5/share.
This reflects the company's robust financial health and shareholder value focus.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders posted Q3 net profit of 8.8B INR, up from 8.1B YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 36B INR compared to 31B INR YoY.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders posted Q3 net profit of 8.8B INR, up from 8.1B YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to 36B INR compared to 31B INR YoY.

news.title:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders to hold a board meeting on 5 Feb 2026 to review unaudited financial results for Q3 FY25-26.
The board will also consider declaring the 2nd interim dividend for FY25-26; trading window closed till 7 Feb 2026.
news.summary:
Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders to hold a board meeting on 5 Feb 2026 to review unaudited financial results for Q3 FY25-26.
The board will also consider declaring the 2nd interim dividend for FY25-26; trading window closed till 7 Feb 2026.

news.title:
The government announced a ₹10,000 Cr plan in Budget 2026 to boost domestic container manufacturing, reducing imports and supporting logistics under Aatmanirbhar Bharat.
Stocks like Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders and BHEL, now venturing into container production, saw gains of 3.2% and 2.5%, respectively, reflecting investor optimism.
news.summary:
The government announced a ₹10,000 Cr plan in Budget 2026 to boost domestic container manufacturing, reducing imports and supporting logistics under Aatmanirbhar Bharat.
Stocks like Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders and BHEL, now venturing into container production, saw gains of 3.2% and 2.5%, respectively, reflecting investor optimism.
